series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with the ordering of directional signage by individual parks from ODOT specific to Ohio state parks via the 732 program, and includes but is not limited to: e-mails, correspondence, spreadsheets, and other related documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years, then destroy. If paper copies are scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
